---
title: forbidden-call-in-wg-go
description: "Reject panic and Done inside WaitGroup.Go."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Reject panic and Done inside WaitGroup.Go. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
group.Go(func() { defer group.Done(); work() })
```

## Good

```go
group.Go(func() { work() })
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only forbidden-call-in-wg-go`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `error`.
